zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk於大約1220年出生在英國越可爾瑟斯克時，他的父親William Mowbray49歲，母親Avice d'Aubigny45歲。他於1238年4月13日之後與Unknown de Furnival在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1263年10月18日之前在英國林可爾史爾哈可，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾朋特福拉可特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk于大约1220年出生在英国越可爾瑟斯克时，他的父亲William Mowbray49岁，母亲Avice d'Aubigny45岁。他于1238年4月13日之后与Unknown de Furnival在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1263年10月18日之前在英国林可爾史爾哈可，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾朋特福拉可特。

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk was born about 1220, in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Mowbray, was 49 and his mother, Avice d'Aubigny, was 45. He married Unknown de Furnival after 13 April 1238, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died before 18 October 1263, in Haxey, Lincolnshire, England, and was buried in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk est né environ 1220, à Thirsk, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Mowbray, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Avice d'Aubigny, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Unknown de Furnival après 13 avril 1238, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 18 octobre 1263, à Haxey, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Pontefract, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk è nato il circa 1220 nel Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Mowbray, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Avice d'Aubigny, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Unknown de Furnival dopo il 13 aprile 1238, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì prima del 18 ottobre 1263, nel Haxey, Lincolnshire, England, e fu sepolto a Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirskが約1220年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスイルスクで生まれた時，父William Mowbrayは49歳，母Avice d'Aubignyは45歳であった。1238年4月13日以後にイギリスイギリスでUnknown de Furnivalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1263年10月18日以前にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアハクシーで死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクトにて埋葬された。

ko.Rise, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 리스
ko.lifeSummary: Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk(이)가 대략 1220년 영국 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mowbray(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice d'Aubigny(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1238년 4월 13일 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 Unknown de Furnival(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 10월 18일 이전 영국 링코실르 하세이에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 폰테프라크트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Thirsk, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Mowbray, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Avice d'Aubigny, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Unknown de Furnival após 13 de abril de 1238, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 18 de outubro de 1263, em Haxey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Rise, Yorkshire, England: рис, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk родился около 1220 г. в местности тирск, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Mowbray было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice d'Aubigny, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Unknown de Furnival после 13 апрель 1238 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер перед 18 октябрь 1263 г. в местности хакси, линколншир, Англия и был похоронен в местности понтефракт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Unknown de Furnival después de 13 de abril de 1238, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió antes de 18 de octubre de 1263, en Haxey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
